scripts.predev: bash -lc 'lsof -ti :8080 -sTCP:LISTEN -nP | xargs -r kill -9; lsof -ti :3000 -sTCP:LISTEN -nP | xargs -r kill -9 || true'
scripts.dev: npm run predev && concurrently "nodemon --delay 500ms app.js" "bash -lc 'sleep 0.5; nodemon --delay 700ms classroom/server.js --watch classroom --ext js,ejs'"
